title: Meshing procedure for the atmospheric wind flow modelling
author: Gancarski Paweł
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: This presentation explains the complete process of mesh creation currently used in CENER for the modelling of wind flow over terrain and mentions tools that are currently in development. The type of mesh chosen for that purpose is a structured, hexagonal mesh, rotated to face the wind direction and with local refinement for modelling wake effects.
